---
name: feature-implementation
description: "Implement a full feature across backend and frontend with tests and docs. Use when: new module, new capability, or multi-step feature work."
argument-hint: "Feature name and scope"
---
# Feature Implementation

## When to Use
- New modules or end-to-end features
- Work that spans backend, frontend, and tests
- Multi-step changes that need coordination

## Procedure
1. Clarify scope, roles, and success criteria.
2. Identify existing patterns and similar modules.
3. Draft a short plan: backend, frontend, tests, docs.
4. Implement backend changes (models, serializers, views, permissions).
5. Implement frontend changes (routes, modules, services, hooks).
6. Add or update tests and mention any gaps.
7. Update docs if behavior or APIs changed.

## Output Format
- Scope summary
- Plan (backend, frontend, tests, docs)
- Changes by area
- Tests added or suggested
- Follow-up items
